scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 22 artifact directory against the repository artifact validator.

scenarios.name: Validator — April 21 scenario difficulty (republish verification)
scenarios.description: Re-validated the April 21 Over the Top board difficulty and the required-new-plant condition against the post-repair tree.
scenarios.details: `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-21` still reports `Canonical result: WIN • wall 1 • clear 01:31 • endless 00:25 • resources left 69`, `Required new plant check: PASS • cottonburrMortar`, confirming the regenerated replay does not change the canonical difficulty profile.

scenarios.name: Playwright — April 21 replay fixture canonical clear (post-repair)
scenarios.description: Replays the regenerated canonical-clear fixture against the live browser runtime and expects the challenge to clear into endless.
scenarios.details: `npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.js tests/uiux/game-2026-04-21-replays.spec.js` — 3 passed. The rewritten 14-action actions[]-format fixture clears the Over the Top board in Chromium for the first time.

scenarios.name: Playwright — April 21 day-detail artifact validation (post-restore)
scenarios.description: Verifies the published April 21 day-detail route renders the decision data, raw artifact links, inline spec, and adjacent-day navigation against the restored manifest entry.

scenarios.name: Playwright — days index contains 2026-04-21 manifest entry
scenarios.description: Verifies the homepage recent-days timeline and days index surface the restored April 21 entry.

scenarios.name: Playwright — tutorial → challenge → endless gating (April 21 still live)
scenarios.description: Asserts the April 21 challenge roster, gating, and endless unlock still behave correctly with the regenerated replay and restored manifest entry.

notes: April 22 is an infra / republish day per spec.md §Prerequisites P1 — the planned Loamspike Burrower feature slipped per the spec's hard-prerequisite rule. All six scenarios above verify the April 21 republish is complete end-to-end: regenerated replay fixture, green Chromium replay spec, restored manifest entry, consistent day-detail artifact trail, and unchanged canonical difficulty profile.
